item.title: OC Bunnysuit Bulma for FF? <3
item.description: It's shiny and has fishnets, so it should fit the theme Don't forget to drink your water! I'm going to get a massage now :) 3 more days until my vacation is over and I go back home. Have a great weekend everyone <3

item.title: Memes vol 663
item.description:
Well well well if it isn’t the scissoring sisters. Hey isn’t that that band. Well well well if it isn’t the cunnilingus cousins- no I’ve gotta stop here
Why is the text so bright
Have you seen the interviews where they ask the cast who’s the most similar to their character and they all say him. That’s scary. He is genuinely terrifying and I think he uses that to his advantage. But he doesn’t look as scary blonde so theres that.
My boyfriend was making small talk with this guy we worked with and they were talking about what kind of music they liked. My boyfriend said he liked rap and this guy responded “Oh no I hate rap. It’s not real music” so my boyfriend asked if he liked Eminem and he said “oh I love Eminem.”
Flat Bruce and Fat Bruce tax
Gertie tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Everyone deserves a living wage for the job they do. Period.

item.title: Republicans protecting known child rapists really makes their "Won't someone think of the children?" bullshit ring pretty hollow.
item.description: We're not going to believe Republicans care about women and children until the child rapists in the Epstein files are brought to justice. Especially the king kiddie fucker: Trump.

item.title: BURNING: Following UKR's mass attack on Putin’s Novorossyisk naval station and oil port, Russia shifted tanker loading to the oil refinery in Tuapse. Well .. thats Tuapse right now. Slava Ukraini.

item.title: Kamlager-Dove on the $$$ impact of Trump's Iran War: "Stevie Wonder can even see how much this war is costing us. And this dude, Dr. Jesus is wanting to spend $2 billion of your money every single day. Fuck his ass."
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: People over Profits, not DINOs over Voters
item.description: climatedefiance disrupted *top Obama staffer* Rahm Emanuel's talk in Morristown NJ — because nobody need yet another Wall Street, investment banking, privileged aristo-performer playing tourist in our actual lives As Obama's chief of staff, Emanuel essentially killed his boss's climate agenda to protect Wall Street. As Ambassador to Japan, he spent years pushing LNG exports — methane gas that traps heat 28x more effectively than CO2. And through all of it, he's been a tireless defender of Israel — their occupation, their racism, their genocide — in fact he once volunteered to serve the IDF. Rahm Emanuel is not just some centrist technocrat. He is a fossil fuel advocate and genocide apologist, with a Democratic Party press pass. And in case you haven't heard, he'd very much like to be president one day. Keep disrupting the multi-millionaire cosplayers who mistake their net worth for something anybody give a fuck about!
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Return of the meme: 1670 (ancient terror in the phone)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Yeah, seriously.
Spotted Towhees are SUPRISINGLY loud.
This is seriously what the goddamn thing is. The Tully Monster seriously looks like evolutionary AI slop or a 5 year old's drawing of a monster brought to life.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "I'm sorry Inconceivable! Hahahahahahaha" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description: I gotta say, she's a lot nicer and more easygoing than most of the directors I've worked with ...

item.title: Thank God Trump didn't pick one of the weird ones to run the HHS
item.dc:creator: CaptainBackPain

item.title: Su-purr-visor Frank
item.description:
So we went in a different direction. A bunch of you recommended Armarkat as a reputable vendor instead of a fly by night Chinese company. So we went there.
Frank was very involved
Empty box inspection complete.
Assembly in progress
Testing the house
It works
Which platform?
Yep.
Chessie will be along shortly, I'm sure.
This should be good for another few years. Thanks for all the suggestions. Also , a funny story about the delivery, Chewy delivered this to my old address. So when I told them that, they just sent me a new one. I told them that I could probably go to my old address and get the old one , but they told me not to bother. So, I didn't, until I got a message from the people who live there now saying that I had a delivery, and they were going to bring it by. So now I have two of these cat trees.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: F*ck Me like it's Friday
item.dc:creator: ImaginaryFriendship

item.title: Let's send food to Imgurians in need
item.description:
Happy Friday everyone, we're excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help a struggling Imgurian get groceries or a meal today there are 2 easy ways -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been an amazing help in feeding more people, we love you so much! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Kevin and his tongue are here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Meal Tally 300 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 350 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th by @OP 430 9th, 10th and 11th by Pizza Angel @ImChangingMyUsername 500 12th, 13th, 14th and 15th by @OP 630 16th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 700 17th and 18th by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 715 19th, 20th, 21st and 22nd by @OP 730 Michael Jordan and Kobe Bryant by Pizza Angel @Jaenen 800 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @gablestout 800 27th, 28th, 29th and 30th by @OP ... Today's Grocery Tally 550 1st by Grocery Angel @pot314 650 2nd by Grocery Angel @noroutesfound 3rd and 4th by Grocery Angel @Eisingrumble
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: Well I am surprised
item.description: Not that surprised, ok I kind of don’t care what happens to her. WOW front page! I read this in News Week this morning. She was saying all this in an interview with Tomi Lauren I don’t really understand the expectation there. It’s mind boggling the self serving attitude of GOP stooges. Thanks for the up votes
